However, the forensic logic engine directly intercepted its completely exposed baseline data: the paid-in capital is an extremely abysmal 40,000 RMB! The insured headcount is an absolute 0! The logical deduction instantly turned into a dark comedy about e-commerce packaging: inside a likely virtually registered small cubicle (No. 596) on the 5th floor of the Science and Technology Finance Building, a boss who hasn't even hired 1 customer service rep, holding 40,000 RMB, claims not only to have opened a super hypermarket selling dozens of general merchandise categories but also to have built a 'plastic equipment and mold manufacturing plant' on the 5th floor? The probe mercilessly deleted all 'manufacturing, processing' delusions from the license. The truth is starkly naked: this is a 100% pure 0-Employee Drop-shipping E-commerce & Universal Proxy Shell operating high up. The boss used to be in e-commerce; registering this shell is primarily to open a store on e-commerce platforms, adopting the 'drop-shipping (no inventory)' model, listing whatever sells well (from clothes to hardware); the 'manufacturing' business added at the end of the license is purely to expand business boundaries and occasionally route funds for engineering invoices.
